title: Add your business
description: With your business's SIREN/SIRET number, we automatically retrieve the necessary information to create the account.
fallback: Don't have a SIREN/SIRET yet? Create a Personal account that you can later switch to a Business account.
search_suggestion: There are too many results, please narrow down your search.
search_not_satisfactory: Can't find your business? Add it manually
description_corporation: Using your company’s registration number/SIRET, we can find the information required to set up your account.
description_association: Using your nonprofit’s registration number/SIRET, we can find the information required to set up your account.
description_administration: Using a public authority’s registration number/SIRET, we can find the information required to set up its account.
fallback_corporation: Don’t have a registration number/SIRET yet? Create a Private Individual account now, which you will later convert to a Business account.
fallback_association: Does your nonprofit not have a registration number/SIRET yet?
fallback_administration: Does your public authority not have a registration number/SIRET yet?
search_not_satisfactory_corporation: Can't find your company? Add it manually
search_not_satisfactory_association: Can’t find your nonprofit? Add it manually
search_not_satisfactory_administration: Can’t find your public authority? Add it manually
find_siret_link_corporation: Don’t know your company’s registration number/SIRET? <anchor>Find it in the companies directory</anchor>
find_siret_link_association: Don’t know your nonprofit’s registration number/SIRET? <anchor>Find it in the nonprofit directory</anchor>
find_siret_link_administration: Don’t know your public authority’s registration number/SIRET? <anchor>Find it in the public authority directory</anchor>
error_no_result: No results found. Please check the registration number/SIRET and try again.
error_invalid_format: The registration number/SIRET must contain 14 digits.
error_internal_server_error: Search failed. Please try again later or add your company manually.
